title: Container Platform 01: Dockerfile + .dockerignore + docker-compose
narrative_md:
# Container Platform 01: Dockerfile + .dockerignore + docker-compose

## Description

The local-dev + image-build foundation per CLAUDE.md (hard requirement). Multi-stage Dockerfile at repo root that produces both nova-api and nova-worker (same image, different command), .dockerignore that keeps test/infra/frontend out of the build context, and docker-compose.yml that brings up the API + a Postgres container for local dev.

## Tech Notes

/Dockerfile (multi-stage):
  Stage 'builder' FROM python:3.12-slim:
    apt-get install build-essential libpq-dev (for asyncpg wheel build)
    COPY requirements.txt; pip install --user --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
  Stage 'runtime' FROM python:3.12-slim:
    apt-get install libpq5 (runtime libpq only)
    Create non-root user 'nova' (uid 1000); WORKDIR /app; COPY --from=builder /root/.local /home/nova/.local; ENV PATH=/home/nova/.local/bin:$PATH
    COPY app/ /app/app/
    USER nova
    EXPOSE 8000
    CMD ["uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

/.dockerignore: .git, .github, tests/, infra/, frontend/, docs/, .factory/, scripts/, .venv/, pycache/, .pyc, .env, .env., .pytest_cache/, .ruff_cache/, .mypy_cache/

/docker-compose.yml at repo root:
  services.api: build context '.', ports '8000:8000', environment DATABASE_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://nova:nova@db:5432/nova, ENVIRONMENT=development, depends_on db (condition service_healthy)
  services.db: image postgres:16-alpine, environment POSTGRES_USER=nova POSTGRES_PASSWORD=nova POSTGRES_DB=nova, ports '5432:5432', healthcheck pg_isready -U nova every 5s, retries 5
  No volume mount of source (avoid Windows/WSL inotify issues); rebuild on code change.
  No .env file mounting — explicit environment block per 12-factor.

tests/test_docker.py (pytest, OPTIONAL — skipped if docker not installed): subprocess.run(['docker', 'build', '-t', 'nova-api:test', '.']) returns 0; subprocess.run(['docker', 'run', '--rm', 'nova-api:test', 'python', '-c', 'from app.main import app']) returns 0.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. docker build -t nova-api:test . at repo root exits 0
2. The built image runs as a non-root user (verify: docker run --rm nova-api:test id -u prints '1000', not '0')
3. The built image's WORKDIR is /app and its CMD launches uvicorn on port 8000 (verify via docker inspect)
4. .dockerignore excludes tests/, infra/, frontend/, .git, .env, pycache/ (verify: build context size on a fresh clone is < 5 MiB)
5. docker compose up -d starts both api and db services; the api container becomes healthy on http://localhost:8000/health within 30s
6. docker compose down cleanly removes both containers and the postgres volume

## Out of Scope

ECR push (C02). ECS task definition (C04). Worker-specific image (uses the same Dockerfile with a CMD override in C04's task definition). Hot-reload mounting (rebuild model for v1). Multi-arch (linux/amd64 only).

stories.description: Create multi-stage Dockerfile with builder and runtime stages
acceptance_criteria: docker build -t nova-api:test . at repo root exits 0
The built image runs as a non-root user (verify: docker run --rm nova-api:test id -u prints '1000', not '0')
The built image's WORKDIR is /app and its CMD launches uvicorn on port 8000 (verify via docker inspect)
.dockerignore excludes tests/, infra/, frontend/, .git, .env, pycache/ (verify: build context size on a fresh clone is < 5 MiB)

stories.description: Create docker-compose.yml with api and postgres services
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up -d starts both api and db services; the api container becomes healthy on http://localhost:8000/health within 30s
docker compose down cleanly removes both containers and the postgres volume
tests/test_docker.py runs docker build and validates app.main can be imported; test is skipped if docker is not installed

risk_flags: Postgres healthcheck dependency on db service must be reliable for consistent compose startup
Requires Docker and Docker Compose to be installed and running on developer machine for local verification
Windows/WSL2 inotify limitations noted; no source volume mounting to avoid rebuild delays
